title: Ground Elements World 2
description: This mod adds decorative blocks that spawn in the world. Pebbles, twigs.
body:
![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/124945b5d6f0a576640c16903c4b45afd7be16a4.png)
# About
**This mod adds new decorative blocks. They will decorate your world.**
Blocks spawn by themselves in the world.
### Translations
- en_us
- ru_ru
- uk_ua
- be_by
  
Would you like to help with the translation? Write to the discord!
### Important
This is a remake of the main mod: [ground elements world](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ground-elements-world).
# Content
- Twigs
- Pebbles
- Pebble (cobblestone nugget)
